behavior_summary: U8P_BARRKILL::hatch executes on a 'U8P_BARRKILL::hatch' trigger and, only when a global guard condition is satisfied, scans a provided area/container for matching items and destroys each matched item.
The routine first inspects the global flag 'metNec1' and returns early if the value does not meet the expected condition.
If the guard passes, the function configures a scan (pushes tokens including the constant 0x0210 and several small bytes), iterates the returned results, and calls Item::destroy for every item found.
notable_control_flow: Immediate read/check of the global flag 'metNec1' followed by a conditional early return if the check fails (guarding the destructive behavior).
A configured scanning step runs only after the guard passes; results are iterated with a loop that calls Item::destroy on each loop variable entry.
Stack and loop cleanup occur after iteration, ensuring no lingering iterator state.
open_questions: What exact comparison/value is used when checking 'metNec1' (the disassembly shows a branch but not the explicit expected value)?
What precise set of items or criteria are selected by the scan tokens (meaning of the pushed bytes and the 0x0210 token is engine-specific and not explicitly documented)?
Is [BP+06h] always an area/container reference, or can it be an actor/inventory handle in different contexts?
When during gameplay does Event 7 ('U8P_BARRKILL::hatch') fire for this object (e.g., area-entry, time-based hatching, or other triggers)?

main_function.name: U8P_BARRKILL::hatch
main_function.purpose: Guarded cleanup: on a U8P_BARRKILL::hatch event, conditionally scan a referenced area/container and destroy matching items if a global prerequisite (metNec1) is satisfied.
entry_conditions: Requires the global flag 'metNec1' to match the expected condition; otherwise the function returns without performing the scan or destruction.

function_map.name: U8P_BARRKILL::hatch
function_map.role: Event handler that performs a guarded area/container scan and destroys matched items

external_calls.purpose: Remove/destroy each item found by the scan (called once per matched item using the loop variable at [BP-02h]).

reads.name: metNec1
reads.likely_effect: A prerequisite/quest-state guard that must match an expected value before the scan-and-destroy sequence runs; read early to decide whether to proceed.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BARRKILL::hatch executes on a 'U8P_BARRKILL::hatch' trigger and, only when a global guard condition is satisfied, scans a provided area/container for matching items and destroys each matched item.
